% Regression fixture: M3 — RecursionError leaks internal path.
%
% A deeply-nested expression (5000+ tokens of 1+1+1+...) triggers
% RecursionError inside compile() before exec() runs.  Without the fix,
% format_compute_traceback's fallback returns the raw traceback exposing
% starlark_worker.py line numbers.
%
% Expected behaviour (with fix):
%   The worker returns ok=false with code E1151 and a message that:
%   - does NOT contain "starlark_worker.py"
%   - does NOT contain "starlark_host.py"
%   - DOES describe a recursion or nesting problem
%
% Expected behaviour (without fix):
%   The message contains the internal path starlark_worker.py:527 (or
%   similar), leaking implementation details to the author.

\begin{animation}[id="recursion-no-path-leak", label="Recursion no path leak"]
\shape{A}{Array}{size=3, data=[1,2,3]}
\step
\compute{x = }
\narrate{This step should never render.}
\end{animation}
